cookies are small text files that can be used by websites to make a user's experience more efficient. the law states that we can store cookies on your device if they are strictly necessary for the operation of this site. for all other types of cookies we need your permission. this site uses different types of cookies. some cookies are placed by third party services that appear on our pages. you can at any time change or withdraw your consent from the cookie declaration on our website. learn more about who we are, how you can contact us and how we process personal data in our privacy policy. please state your consent id and date when you contact us regarding your consent.

recruit from two of southeast asia's bustling markets.
in-person student fairs throughout vietnam and indonesia
across southeast asia demand for overseas study continues to rise, and our two-country tour will show you why!
over this action-packed itinerary, you’ll meet thousands of students who are eager to learn about their study abroad options and to find schools that best match their educational goals.
with institutions planning long overdue trips to the region, we suggest interested exhibitors register soon as these events will sell out early.
join visits to indonesian and vietnamese top high schools
to bolster your recruitment efforts, bmi takes a limited number of accredited institutions to visit top-rated private high schools in jakarta, ho chi minh city and hanoi.
these exclusive schools have been carefully selected for their high fees, quality curriculum and their enthusiasm to proactively prepare their students for studying abroad.
at each school, you will participate in an on-campus fair that will directly connect you with senior students, parents and high school counsellors.
the best way to understand what happens at bmi education fairs is to join them!
in the meantime, to give you a small snapshot of what it feels like to attend one of our events, watch our video for a quick tour of the global education fair held in vietnam recently.
plan your 2026 southeast asia tour today!
